headline: C.H. Robinson Worldwide Investors Back Board, Pay Plan in Annual Meeting Votes
summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NASDAQ:CHRW) shareholders approved all four proposals presented at the company’s 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, including the re-election of 10 directors, an advisory vote on executive compensation, the ratification of Deloitte & Touche LLP as the company’s indepen

headline: April McClain Delaney Bought Up To 15K Worth of Entegris Stock: Here's What You Should Know
summary: Rep. April McClain Delaney disclosed purchases of Entegris stock and several industrial and healthcare stocks in April, adding semiconductor exposure as AI-driven demand continues to support chip-related companies.
